/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/armor_info__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/serial_driver__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/eee/ros2/src/armor_detect_ros2-main/build/armor_interfaces: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
